{{Quote|I am Doctor Mi Fon Lu of the Theed Academy. I came here when I heard of the amazing discoveries coming from these perfectly preserved ruins. It is amazing to think that where we now stand was once a thriving temple during the period of the Old Republic. That was thousands of years ago, of course.|Doctor Mi Fon Lu, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:AAP" />}}
[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Mi Fon Lu''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeologist]] who once wanted to study the [[Jedi enclave (Mustafar)/Legends|Jedi Enclave]] ruins on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. However, he had some trouble studying the ruins due to a group of [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark]] [[The Force/Legends|Force]] users calling themselves the [[Blackguard (Mustafar)/Legends|Blackguard]], who made their headquarters there. Eventually, Mi Fon Lu hired a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] to eliminate the group, and was finally able to gain access when the bounty hunter successfully defeated them. The Doctor rewarded the bounty hunter with 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and a [[Mustafarian Distance Globe]]. It is rumored that the remnants of the Blackguard eventually took back the ruins and sought revenge on him.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Mi Fon Lu appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:AAP" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Doctor Mi Fon Lu was added to the game with the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan|''Trials of Obi-Wan'']] on [[November 1]], [[2005]].<ref name="SWG:AAP" />
